name: H.p.c.
description_short: HPC Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit financial institution serving 8,000+ members across Alpena and Mio, Michigan since 1950, offering savings accounts, loans, and business services.
description_long:
H.P.C. Credit Union has operated as a community-focused financial institution for over 70 years, establishing itself as a trusted local alternative to traditional banks in northern Michigan. Founded in 1950, the credit union has grown to serve more than 8,000 members across three full-service branch locations—two in Alpena and one in Mio. As a member-owned, not-for-profit organization, HPC operates under the credit union philosophy of 'People Helping People,' reinvesting earnings back into member benefits rather than shareholder profits.

HPC Credit Union offers a comprehensive suite of financial products and services tailored to both personal and business members. On the consumer side, they provide share accounts (savings), share draft accounts (checking), certificates, IRAs, HSAs, youth savings accounts, and club accounts. Their lending portfolio includes auto loans with preapproval options, home mortgages with preapproval, home equity loans, personal loans, student loans, recreational vehicle loans, and specialized products like MSDHA loans. They also offer credit cards with rewards programs, online banking through It'sMe247, mobile banking, bill pay, phone banking, and ATM/debit card access. For business members, HPC provides business share accounts, business checking, and specialized online banking through BizLink with mobile functionality, plus Quicken and QuickBooks integration.

What distinguishes HPC Credit Union from larger financial institutions is their deep local roots and personalized community focus. With only three branch locations concentrated in a specific geographic region, they maintain direct relationships with their membership and offer specialized services like certified credit union financial counseling. Their emphasis on youth financial education, evidenced by programs like youth savings accounts and reading activities with giveaways, reflects a commitment to community financial literacy. The credit union also prioritizes member security, with explicit fraud awareness messaging and proactive alerts about phishing scams.

HPC Credit Union is best suited for individuals and small business owners in the Alpena-Mio area who value community banking and member-owned financial institutions. However, potential members should note that geographic service limitations (only three branches in northern Michigan) and membership eligibility requirements may restrict access. Their product offerings are solid but less extensive than mega-banks, and rates/terms should be compared against regional competitors.
services: Share accounts (savings) and share draft accounts (checking)
Certificates of deposit and club accounts
Individual Retirement Accounts (IRA and Premier IRA)
Youth savings accounts with financial education
Auto loans with Auto Check preapproval
Home mortgages with preapproval and home equity loans
Recreational vehicle loans and MSDHA loans
Credit cards with Scorecard Rewards program
Business checking and business share accounts with BizLink online banking
Digital banking (It'sMe247, mobile app, online bill pay, phone banking)
pros: Member-owned, not-for-profit structure returns earnings to members rather than external shareholders
Over 70 years of established history (since 1950) and deep community roots in northern Michigan
Offers specialized products including MSDHA loans, HSAs, Premier IRAs, and recreational vehicle financing
Comprehensive digital banking including It'sMe247 online banking, mobile app, and BizLink for business members
Three full-service branch locations with shared branching access through credit union network
Youth savings accounts and certified credit union financial counseling for member education
Preapproval programs for auto loans and mortgages to streamline borrowing process
cons: Limited to three branch locations (two in Alpena, one in Mio, Michigan), restricting convenience for members outside service area
Smaller institution may have fewer product variants or promotional rates compared to larger credit unions or banks
No geographic expansion mentioned, making membership inaccessible to those outside northern Michigan
Membership eligibility requirements not detailed on available pages, potentially excluding some consumers
Limited information about rates, terms, fees, or competitive positioning available on website
best_for: Alpena and Mio, Michigan residents seeking community-focused banking with member-ownership benefits
Small business owners in the service area needing integrated business checking and online banking
Families interested in youth financial education and savings programs for children
Consumers prioritizing long-term relationships with local financial institutions over national chains
diagnosis: HPC Credit Union is ideal for Michigan residents in the Alpena-Mio area who value community banking and member-owned financial institutions offering a full range of personal and business services. The primary caveat is severe geographic limitation—with only three branches in northern Michigan, the credit union is inaccessible to most consumers outside this specific region, and membership eligibility requirements are not publicly detailed.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
